issue.title: WPHX-312.96 — Close bounded HTTP, cron, mail, feed, and embed domain

command: domain closure audit over WPHX-312 receipts
artifact_scope: mixed: source_inventory, adapter_contract, oracle_source_mirror, compiler_emitted_public_shell, packaged_distribution, upstream_suite_parity

artifacts.role: HTTP, cron, mail, feeds, embeds, HTTPS, privacy, AI HTTP, and trackback source/distribution/ABI/upstream surface inventory
initial installed-style HTTP, cron, mail, feed, oEmbed, trackback, and privacy route gate
recorded WP_Http::request transport parity gate against WPHX PHP emitted shell
controlled cron loopback and PHPMailer SMTP capture installed-style transport gate
feed, comment feed, oEmbed, post embed, RSS widget/block, and privacy installed-route gate
provisioned WPHX-312 upstream PHPUnit pass/pass evidence
copied public surface follow-up plan for generated adapters, vendor policy, installed routes, live transport, cron/mail transport, and upstream PHPUnit

fixtures_cover: side-effect-safe HTTP response/header/cookie/encoding helpers, cron scheduling, and wp_mail short-circuit behavior

feed text/content helpers, local embeds, oEmbed provider/data/XML helpers, HTTPS migration/detection branches, OPML/feed templates, RSS comments, Magpie/SimplePie, RSS widget/class/block rendering, trackbacks, and privacy mail/admin state
WPHX PHP compiler-emitted HTTP helper/class/request branch candidates and recorded WP_Http::request transport parity
controlled local cron loopback and wp_mail/PHPMailer SMTP capture transport observations
installed-style feed/comment feed/oEmbed/post embed/RSS widget/RSS block/privacy confirmation/privacy list-table route observations
selected upstream WPHX-312 PHPUnit groups with vanilla pass / candidate pass classifications
remaining_gaps: Generated public PHP replacement for copied WPHX-312 feed/embed/cron/mail/HTTP wrapper surfaces is not claimed; WPHX-312.101 and WPHX PHP follow-up own generated adapter replacement.
Preserved-vendor classification for SimplePie, PHPMailer, Requests-adjacent vendor code, and other third-party surfaces remains WPHX-323 work.
Full generated/Haxe candidate overlays are not present in the upstream PHPUnit candidate root; the ratchet proves executable selected upstream pass/pass against pinned vanilla/candidate worktrees.

Live network/provider behavior, DNS/proxy/TLS negotiation, external oEmbed/feed provider availability, production cron timing races, and real PHP mail/SMTP operational delivery remain later distribution work.

Database-backed installed feed/comment/enclosure/bookmark/widget/privacy state, full admin list-table/screen behavior, and block cross-domain ownership remain WPHX-315/WPHX-316/WPHX-314 or later distribution gates.
This closes the bounded WPHX-312 evidence slice, not the whole WordPress HTTP/feed/embed/mail subsystem or complete ecosystem parity.
